generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; consumer GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: Only sourced money events are written as facts. Unsupported founder cash, margin, burn, loss, CAC, refund or subsidy amounts remain in research_gaps.

founder_background: Steve Jobs: Co-founded Apple in 1976 and drove product, brand and integrated hardware/software philosophy.
Steve Wozniak: Designed Apple I hardware and early Apple technical foundation.
Ronald Wayne: Drafted early partnership documents and exited shortly after founding; useful as a risk-boundary lesson.
Tim Cook: Not a founder; represents Apple’s supply-chain, services and operating-system era.
brand_timeline: 1976: founder_cash Volkswagen van + HP calculator - Jobs and Wozniak sold personal items to fund early Apple I work; do not overstate as audited startup capital.
1976: first_order 50 units x $500 - Byte Shop ordered 50 assembled Apple I units at $500 each, creating the first real commercial pull.
1977: angel_credit $92K + $250K line of credit - Mike Markkula invested personal capital and helped secure credit, according to public Apple history.
2025: revenue $416.16B revenue / $112.01B net income - FY2025 revenue and net income from public financial summaries; exact audited values should be checked in SEC filing.

research_gaps: Live Apple Store prices vary by storage, carrier and region; use official product pages for final quote.
Do not infer product-level margins beyond Apple segment disclosures.
Vision Pro return rate and unit loss are not written without primary/credible source.

gtm_extension.summary: Apple 的 GTM 是“高端硬件入口 + 操作系统锁定 + 服务订阅 + 官方零售体验”的复合模型。它不是单卖 iPhone，而是用 iPhone、Mac、Watch、AirPods 和 Vision 把用户带进 Apple ID，再通过 iCloud、Apple One、AppleCare、App Store 和配件持续变现。学习重点是生态系统如何把一次性硬件购买变成多年复购和订阅，但监管、AI 落后、Vision Pro 定价和中国竞争会持续削弱这套围墙。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: Apple 的 GTM 是“高端硬件入口 + 操作系统锁定 + 服务订阅 + 官方零售体验”的复合模型。
channel_path: Apple I first order and early hobbyist trust
Apple Store / carrier / online store control purchase experience
Apple ID and ecosystem features raise switching cost
Services, AppleCare, accessories and trade-in extend lifetime value

channels.dtc: Official site/store is the clearest conversion path and pricing source.
channels.ecommerce: Marketplaces, retailers, and regional stores broaden reach beyond owned traffic.
channels.pr_media: Reviews, launch events, and credible media explain why the product deserves attention.
channels.community: User reviews, forums, creator content, or owner communities decide whether early demand becomes trust.
channels.service: Warranty, repair, delivery, setup, installation, and support determine long-term brand quality.
channels.retail: Apple Store and carriers turn high-price devices into assisted purchases.
channels.services: Apple One, iCloud, AppleCare and App Store monetize installed base.

business_model.pricing_logic: Premium hardware anchors brand margin; service bundles and care plans monetize active devices.
business_model.channel_economics: Owned retail and OS integration reduce channel leakage and raise lifetime value.

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品或产品线；按公开证据、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和用户购买决策选择。

top_products.name: iPhone 17 / Air / Pro line
top_products.why_selected: iPhone is Apple’s core revenue engine and the gateway to the services stack.
top_products.origin_story: Apple’s first product-market wedge was integrated personal computing; iPhone became the modern ecosystem anchor.
top_products.pre_market: Consumers compare iPhone against Samsung, Google Pixel, Huawei and Xiaomi on camera, AI, trade-in, carrier subsidy and ecosystem lock-in.
top_products.innovation: A19/A19 Pro, Apple Intelligence integration, camera upgrades, iOS continuity and trade-in support.
top_products.breakout: iPhone keeps Apple in the global premium smartphone profit pool.
top_products.customer_impact: Users buy not just a phone, but iMessage, AirDrop, iCloud, Watch, AirPods and resale value.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It sets the pricing umbrella for premium smartphones and forces competitors to bundle AI and ecosystem features.

pricing_model.product_price: Current Apple lineup includes iPhone 17 family; media/retail signals put iPhone 17 from about $799, iPhone Air around $999, Pro models above that depending on storage.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Apple Intelligence is included with compatible devices; software monetization comes through iCloud+, Apple One, App Store and other services rather than a mandatory iPhone OS subscription.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: cases, MagSafe accessories, adapters, AppleCare+ or AppleCare One; AppleCare One starts at $19.99/mo for three Apple devices.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Samsung Galaxy S/Ultra, Google Pixel Pro, Huawei Mate/Pura and Xiaomi 15/15 Ultra compete across $799-$1,499+ premium bands; Xiaomi 15 Ultra Europe launch started at €1,499 / £1,299.

sources.title: The Verge Xiaomi 15 / 15 Ultra Europe price

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把找不到来源的自筹金额、毛利、亏损或补贴硬写进报告。
不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

sources.title: Investopedia Apple revenue by segment FY2025

top_products.name: Apple One / Services
top_products.why_selected: Services convert installed base into recurring high-margin revenue.
top_products.origin_story: After iPhone scale matured, Apple used Apple ID and device integration to bundle media, storage, games, fitness and news.
top_products.pre_market: Users first subscribe because iCloud storage, music, TV, games and family sharing solve daily friction.
top_products.innovation: Apple One bundles multiple services and makes cancellation psychologically harder than single subscriptions.
top_products.breakout: FY2025 services revenue and margin show the second growth curve.
top_products.customer_impact: Families can share bundles across devices, increasing stickiness.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: Apple’s service bundle is the template for device-first recurring revenue.

pricing_model.product_price: Apple One official US pricing: Individual $19.95/mo, Family $25.95/mo, Premier $37.95/mo.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software fee is the product: Apple One is monthly with no long-term commitment; individual subscriptions can remain separate.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: iCloud storage upgrades, AppleCare, App Store purchases and paid apps add to total Apple ID spend.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor subscription comparison: Google One / YouTube Premium / Play Pass, Amazon Prime, Samsung/Galaxy services and Microsoft 365 compete for household software spend, but none are as tightly tied to a premium hardware installed base.

sources.title: Investopedia Apple revenue by segment FY2025

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。

top_products.name: Apple Vision Pro / spatial computing
top_products.why_selected: Vision Pro is the clearest example of Apple’s premium GTM risk.
top_products.origin_story: Apple tried to define spatial computing as a post-iPhone category through high-end hardware and developer ecosystem.
top_products.pre_market: Pre-market excitement came from Apple brand trust, not proven daily usage.
top_products.innovation: High-resolution displays, eye/hand interface, spatial media and Apple ecosystem integration.
top_products.breakout: It created attention but not mass adoption because price, comfort and app depth were weak.
top_products.customer_impact: Early users paid for a developer/prosumer experiment rather than a mainstream device.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It shows that Apple’s premium formula does not work if the job-to-be-done is unclear.

pricing_model.product_price: Vision Pro launched at $3,499 in the US; current product pricing varies by storage and region.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No mandatory standalone software subscription; value depends on apps, media subscriptions, Apple TV+, iCloud and developer ecosystem.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: inserts, cases, batteries, straps and AppleCare; AppleCare page lists AppleCare One from $19.99/mo and Vision Pro AppleCare section as separate coverage source.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Meta Quest line is far cheaper; Ray-Ban Meta and other AI glasses attack a lighter, cheaper use case instead of full spatial computing.

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。

learning_summary: Apple 的第一性原理是把硬件入口变成长期生态税。
服务业务是第二增长曲线，但它依赖硬件安装基数和监管边界。
高端定价只有在明确日常使用场景成立时才成立。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 找不到的内容不补写；缺失的创始人现金、单台毛利、广告投放、退货损失、售后成本留在 research_gaps。
